semantic.role: Package manifest for the ArchSpine CLI tool, defining metadata, entry points, dependencies, and scripts for building, testing, and publishing the project.
responsibilities: CLI binary registration and entry point resolution
Build, test, and release pipeline orchestration
Dependency management for runtime and development
invariants: TypeScript compilation must succeed before CLI execution
All test suites must pass before release
Schema compliance tests are mandatory in CI

English.role: Package manifest for the ArchSpine CLI tool, defining metadata, entry points, dependencies, and scripts for building, testing, and publishing the project.

parameter_definitions.name: Project identifier used for npm registry and internal references.
parameter_definitions.version: Semantic versioning string that controls release lifecycle and compatibility.
parameter_definitions.description: Human-readable summary of the project's purpose.
parameter_definitions.main: Primary entry point for the module; resolved by Node.js when importing the package.
parameter_definitions.bin: Maps CLI commands ('spine', 'archspine') to executable scripts; critical for user-facing tool invocation.
parameter_definitions.type: Module type ('module' enables ES module syntax); affects import/export behavior.
parameter_definitions.engines: Declares minimum Node.js version (>=20); prevents runtime failures on unsupported platforms.
parameter_definitions.files: Whitelist of files/directories included in npm publish; excludes mocks, source maps, and unnecessary artifacts.
parameter_definitions.scripts: Defines automation commands for build, test, lint, docs, and release; orchestrates CI/CD pipeline.
parameter_definitions.license: Apache-2.0 license governs usage, modification, and distribution rights.
parameter_definitions.dependencies: Runtime packages required for CLI execution; includes AST-grep language parsers.
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: Build-time and test-time tools (TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest, etc.); not shipped to end users.

English.stability_and_risks: This file is the foundation of the project's build and release pipeline. Misconfiguration (e.g., incorrect 'main' or 'bin' paths) can break CLI invocation. Engine constraints prevent deployment on incompatible Node versions. The 'files' whitelist reduces distribution size but may accidentally exclude necessary assets. Scripts define critical gates (test, schema validation) that enforce quality; skipping them increases risk of shipping broken code. Dependency versions should be pinned or locked to avoid supply-chain issues.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine CLI 工具的包清单，定义了元数据、入口点、依赖关系以及构建、测试和发布的脚本。

parameter_definitions.name: 项目标识符，用于 npm 注册表和内部引用。
parameter_definitions.version: 语义化版本号，控制发布生命周期和兼容性。
parameter_definitions.main: 模块的主入口文件，Node.js 导入包时解析此路径。
parameter_definitions.bin: 将 CLI 命令（'spine'、'archspine'）映射到可执行脚本；对用户调用工具至关重要。
parameter_definitions.type: 模块类型（'module' 启用 ES 模块语法），影响导入/导出行为。
parameter_definitions.engines: 声明最低 Node.js 版本（>=20），防止在不支持的平台上运行时出错。
parameter_definitions.files: npm 发布时包含的文件/目录白名单，排除模拟文件、源码映射和不必要的工件。
parameter_definitions.scripts: 定义构建、测试、代码检查、文档和发布的自动化命令，编排 CI/CD 流程。
parameter_definitions.license: Apache-2.0 许可证规定了使用、修改和分发权限。
parameter_definitions.dependencies: CLI 执行所需的运行时包，包括 AST-grep 语言解析器。
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: 构建和测试阶段的工具（TypeScript、ESLint、Vitest 等），不随最终用户版本发布。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此文件是项目构建和发布流程的基础。配置错误（例如 'main' 或 'bin' 路径不正确）可能导致 CLI 无法调用。引擎约束可防止在不兼容的 Node 版本上部署。'files' 白名单减少了分发体积，但可能意外排除必要资源。脚本定义了关键的质量门禁（测试、模式验证），跳过它们会增加发布有缺陷代码的风险。应锁定依赖版本以避免供应链问题。
